pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup_task.sh which explicitly inject these real NORAD IDs into the GPredict cache.
Task instructions explicitly requesting Latitude 37.2982 N (Zion Canyon real-world coordinates).
Task instructions explicitly requesting Longitude 113.0263 W.
Task instructions explicitly requesting Altitude 1300 meters.
Task instructions explicitly requesting Minimum elevation 30 degrees.
Task instructions requesting Polar view, which natively corresponds to GTK_SAT_MOD_VIEW_POLAR value 2 in GPredict.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env gnss_canyon_survey_planning task by confirming that the GNSS satellite data (NAVSTAR and GALILEO) and TLEs are real, injected via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected ground station parameters (Zion Canyon at 37.2982 N, 113.0263 W, 1300m) and the expected min_elevation (30) exactly match the task description instructions. The requested Polar view natively maps to view_type 2. Additionally, discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable despite task.json referencing it.
